themes.label: Salvation
themes.summary: This chapter speaks of rescue, deliverance, redemption, life, or being saved. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "Yet ye have forsaken me, and served other gods: wherefore I will deliver you no more. This ve...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַצִּילֵ֥נוּ: unto thee deliver - to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense".

12: and I rescued you from their hands
